summary: PERFORMANCE HOTFIX VALIDATED: Accounts section now loads in ~0.89s (was 6.35s). N+1 query fix using get_bulk_balances() working correctly. All functionality preserved - API contract, balances, search, pagination.

performance_validation.Expected improvement: ~7x faster (from N+1 queries to single bulk query)

api_contract_preserved.Account fields camelCase: PASS - userName, userEmail, userId, balance present

balances_populated.Non-zero balances: PASS - 45 of 50 accounts have non-zero balance

critical_code_review_comments: Performance fix correctly implemented: get_bulk_balances() replaces N get_balance() calls
Single MongoDB aggregation pipeline fetches all balances in O(1) query
Balance map lookup is O(1) per account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance hotfix for Accounts section validated. Response time improved from 6.35s to 0.89s (~7x improvement). Uses get_bulk_balances() instead of N individual get_balance() calls. All other admin sections working correctly.
rca_of_issue: Original N+1 query problem: For each of 50 accounts, a separate get_balance() call was made to MongoDB, resulting in 6.35s load time. Fix: Implemented get_bulk_balances() that fetches all balances in a single aggregation query, reducing load time to ~0.89s.
